title: Goonj Uthi Shehnai
writer: Qamar Jalalabadi, Shiv Kumar, Gajanan Digambar Madgulkar
actors: Rajendra Kumar Tuli, Ameeta, Anita Guha
plot: Childhood sweethearts Gopi and Kishen hope to get married when they are grown up. Gopi dances to the magical tunes of Kishen's clarinet (shenai), and both are virtually inseparable. Years pass by, both have grown up and Gopi's mom...
